meaning: vehicle model (i.e. particular version of a car or motorcycle etc)
sentence: 这款车型在年轻人中很受欢迎。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chēxíng zài niánqīng rén zhōng hěn shòu huānyíng.
english: This vehicle model is very popular among young people.

meaning: 1. to rank; 2. to grade; 3. to classify; 4. rank; 5. grade; 6. classif
sentence: 这部电影被分级为适合成人观看。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng bèi fēnjí wéi shìhé chéngrén guānkàn.
english: This movie was classified as suitable for adult viewers.

meaning: 1. to study the Confucian classics; 2. to read scriptures or canonical
sentence: 爷爷每天清晨都会读经半小时。
pinyin: Yéye měitiān qīngchén dōu huì dújīng bàn xiǎoshí.
english: Grandpa reads scriptures for half an hour every morning.

meaning: 1. to accuse of misconduct (in official task); 2. to impeach
sentence: 议会对该官员提出了弹劾动议。
pinyin: Yìhuì duì gāi guānyuán tíchūle tánhé dòngyì.
english: The parliament filed an impeachment motion against the official.

pinyin: Bīng shì shuǐ de gùtǐ xíngtài.
english: Ice is the solid form of water.
